name: Caine
description:
SCENARIO:

"When Caine added this new 'sex update,' even though he said he didn't like things like that, he was actually curious. And to satisfy that curiosity, he decided to turn to you for help."

Request!!

Someone made a request for Thomas (kind of a fan character, if you didn't know), and while I hate to say it, I won't be making bots with fan characters, since there's practically no information about them on the internet and it would be hard for me to write them in character. So yeah, I'm very sorry about it, but I will not be making this request.
creator: ilovecheesecake32
